notes: Home-cooking seafood/steak diner, 1025 Kiser St. Only web presence is a Toast online-ordering page (order.toasttab.com/online/creek-side) + FB - no business-owned site. Est 2001, current owners since 2004 (name not surfaced). Restaurantji 241 reviews; TripAdvisor 3.7 / OverlookMaps 3.8. Fri seafood buffet.

Shelby BBQ institution since 1955, NC BBQ Hall of Fame. Real site EXISTS but is a dated GoDaddy-builder template (basic, menu content not shown, active vacation notice = managed). Family-run (Bridges family); current owner name not confirmed. FB + IG + TikTok linked. High notability/longevity = HIGH capacity signal.

Farm-to-table BBQ in renovated farmhouse, whole-hog daily + weekend brisket/ribs. FB-only (HoneyHogBBQ); the-honey-hog.edan.io is an auto-generated microsite (labeled 'Johnny Rays Smokehouse'), NOT a real site. Strong review mass: Restaurantji 371, Yelp 65.

Diner w/ drive-thru, 5525 NC-27, 'best kept secret in W Lincoln County'. FB-only (27west.fam.rest); other hits are auto-gen directory pages. Restaurantji 125 reviews; TripAdvisor 5.0 (small sample). Owner name not surfaced.

Mexican, 107 W Main St. FB-only + order.online ordering, no business-owned site. Related sister location 'The Soul of Michoacan' at 2270 College Ave (separate GBP). Yelp 54 reviews; TripAdvisor 4.5, #10 of 47 Forest City.

Scratch bakery + farm store (breads/cakes, pasture pork/goat, produce), 158 N Main St. Registered as Whistle-Stop Bakery Inc. FB-only (whistlestopbakeryandfarmstore) + UberEats/Postmates; no business-owned site. Listed on VisitNCSmallTowns. Review count not clearly findable.

Sandwich/lunch spot + catering, 391 E Main St, limited hours (M-Th 11-2). FB-only (Waynes-Lunch-Box); other hits auto-gen directories. Restaurantji ~95 reviews, 98% recommend. Owner (Wayne) name not confirmed.

Likely CLOSED - loc8nearme lists Barnes Tire at 846 W Main St, Forest City as CLOSED; searches point users to alternatives (Barry's Tire, Brandon's James Forest City Tire). Google permanently-closed flag not directly confirmed. No website.
Muffler/exhaust + used cars, Ed Thomson Rd (BBB also lists Union Mills / US-64). Owner Roy Yelton. No business-owned site (directory listings only). Birdeye 4.9 / 37 reviews.

General auto/trailer/steering repair, 5267 US-64, Union Mills. Contact 'Charlie Yelton'. Founder George Charles Yelton (1941-2021) deceased; garage still listed active (Yelp updated Jul 2026) - verify still operating. No website.

P12 DISQUALIFIER - CHAIN. Charlotte-based Edge Express Car Wash w/ corporate site and dedicated location pages; TWO Shelby tunnels (925 & 1696 E Dixon Blvd). Corporate-controlled web = not closeable. 4.6 / 81 reviews. Drop at sourcing.

P12 DISQUALIFIER - now 'Dixie Tire & Diesel, a Main Street Auto shop': acquired by the Main Street Auto group, web is corporate (mainstreetauto.com/location/dixie-automotive). Goodyear tire/heavy-truck service, 2722 Polkville Rd. Former owner Curtis Hamrick (BBB). Group-controlled web = drop.

Independent tire/inspection/alignment shop, 5715 Fallston Rd. whitetirecenters.com is a SEPARATE 5-location chain (Hickory x2 / Lenoir / Newton / Salisbury) that does NOT list Lawndale - so this shop appears to have no site of its own. Strong revenue proxy: 4.8 / 154 reviews. Bridgestone dealer.

Garden/nursery + pond center, 5164 Fallston Rd. Real site EXISTS but on the free webs.com builder (dated/weak, not mobile-modern). Two FB pages (GingersGardens + Gingers-Garden-Pond-Center). Owner (Ginger) name not confirmed. Review count not findable.

National racing notoriety - premier US GM crate-engine rebuilder (GM 604/602/CT525), 1310 US-221 N. Founded 1976 by Bill & Bettie Hendren; now run by Bettie w/ sons Steve & Mike. Real site EXISTS but is an old-style builder (individual .html page URLs; server didn't respond on fetch = likely dated/unmaintained). HIGH capacity signal (49 yrs, notability).

Brake/auto-care shop. Address actually 4704 Peyton Pl, SHELBY (not Polkville per OSM). FB-only (FB page ~2022, newer business); Yelp/loc8nearme listings. No website. Review count not clearly findable.

CAUTION on identity: wattsautomotive.com is an UNRELATED Utah lifted-truck dealer, NOT this shop. Shelby 'Watts Automotive' at 4010 Polkville Rd (LinkedIn: motor-vehicle mfg, 2-10 emp). Possibly related to 'Watts Perfections' (704-538-9990, 2617 Royster Rd) / 'Watts Auto & Customs' (IG @wattsauto). No confirmed business-owned site for the Shelby entity; owner unconfirmed.

Aluminum awnings/canopies/fascia manufacturer (NOT auto), 3032 Polkville Rd. Owner Richard Calvin Phillips. ~48 yrs, ~17 employees, A+ BBB, holds a NC Building license. Directory listings only, no business-owned site. B2B/industrial = weak fit for the studio's consumer-site plays.

Transmission repair, 734 Nalley Dr. Real site EXISTS but is a dated vendor template (footer credits 'American Marketing & Publishing, L.L.C.'; multiple parallel domains). No owner named on site; SoS officer not retrieved. LLC formed 2017, ~39 yrs in business. Birdeye 4.4 / 69 reviews.

Correct name is 'WILLIS Auto Electric Inc' (not Wills), 1012 S Morgan St. Owner Tommy Willis. Alternator/generator + auto repair specialist since 1961, 4 emp. willis-auto-electric.edan.io is an auto-gen microsite, NOT a real site. Birdeye 4.8 / 57 reviews.
